hints: Use BFS (Breadth-First Search) to traverse the tree level by level.
Use a queue to store nodes at each level.
Use a delimiter (like null) to separate different levels in the queue.
For each level, collect all node values in a list, then add that list to the result.
When you encounter the delimiter, it means you've finished processing one level.
Add the delimiter back to the queue after processing each level (except the last one).
